identity: Male demon-hunter (tiefling), young adult, pale violet-lavender skin, sharp pointed elf-like ears, two curving ram-like horns framing a short blond flat-top haircut, slit yellow eyes, stern face.
outfit: Dark brown leather armor with segmented plates, a bright red scarf or cowl wrapped around the neck, brown leather belts with buckles across the chest.
weapons: Twin curved steel swords carried in crossed scabbards on the back; hilts visible over each shoulder.
attackStyle: East-facing. Both swords drawn, mid-slash — right sword sweeping across the body, left sword raised behind for a follow-up, red scarf streaming.
spellStyle: East-facing. Right sword pointed forward, left hand raised with purple demon-bane fire flickering on the palm.
blockStyle: East-facing. Both swords crossed in front of the torso in an X guard, chin down, horns visible.
koStyle: East-facing, on one knee, both swords dropped in front of him, head bowed, scarf slumped.
southStyle: Facing camera (south), calm idle. Swords still sheathed on the back, hilts visible over each shoulder, hands at sides.
portraitStyle: Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Violet-lavender skin, two curving horns, blond flat-top hair, pointed ears, slit yellow eyes, red scarf around the neck, brown leather armor, sword hilts visible over each shoulder.

referenceSheet.prompt:
IDENTITY (this image becomes the canonical identity anchor — preserve in every downstream frame): Male demon-hunter (tiefling), young adult, pale violet-lavender skin, sharp pointed elf-like ears, two curving ram-like horns framing a short blond flat-top haircut, slit yellow eyes, stern face.

OUTFIT: Dark brown leather armor with segmented plates, a bright red scarf or cowl wrapped around the neck, brown leather belts with buckles across the chest.

WEAPONS: Twin curved steel swords carried in crossed scabbards on the back; hilts visible over each shoulder.

CLASS: humanoid. Full-body view, head to feet visible. Character occupies ~70% of the canvas height. Feet aligned near the bottom; headroom above.

POSE: full-body side profile facing right (east), calm combat-ready idle. Head up, eyes visible. NOT a portrait bust, NOT a close-up — entire character from head to feet.

STYLE: detailed pixel art with clean readable silhouette, warm pixel-art palette, transparent background, no ground shadow.

portrait.prompt:
IDENTITY (must match reference sheet exactly): Male demon-hunter (tiefling), young adult, pale violet-lavender skin, sharp pointed elf-like ears, two curving ram-like horns framing a short blond flat-top haircut, slit yellow eyes, stern face.

OUTFIT: Dark brown leather armor with segmented plates, a bright red scarf or cowl wrapped around the neck, brown leather belts with buckles across the chest.

WEAPONS: Twin curved steel swords carried in crossed scabbards on the back; hilts visible over each shoulder.

POSE (portrait): Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Violet-lavender skin, two curving horns, blond flat-top hair, pointed ears, slit yellow eyes, red scarf around the neck, brown leather armor, sword hilts visible over each shoulder.

FRAMING: bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view, centered in a 256x256 canvas, shoulders fill the lower third.

SCALE (non-negotiable): character must occupy approximately 180px of the 256px canvas height — roughly 70%. Do NOT stretch or upscale. Extra space above head and/or below feet is correct.

STYLE: pixel art, transparent background, no ground shadow, no borders, no text. Match the palette and style of the reference sheet.

NEGATIVE: do not add weapons or props not listed in WEAPONS. Do not change palette, species, or outfit from the reference sheet. Do not zoom in — respect SCALE.
